Name: Average time from SW-AE Assign Reviewers to SW-Reviewer Agreed
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'SW-AE Assign Reviewers' and activity 'SW-Reviewer Agreed'

Name: Total time between SW-AE Assign Reviewers and SW-Reviewer Agreed across all variants
Metric: The sum of the duration between activity 'SW-AE Assign Reviewers' and activity 'SW-Reviewer Agreed'

Name: Minimum time it takes SW-Reviewer Agreed to occur after SW-AE Assign Reviewers
Metric: The minimum of the duration between activity 'SW-AE Assign Reviewers' and activity 'SW-Reviewer Agreed'

Name: Average duration of the SW-AE Assign Reviewers activity itself (time between its first and last occurrence within the same case)
Metric: The average of the duration between activity SW-AE Assign Reviewers and the end of the case

Name: Total resolution time of SW-AE Assign Reviewers in cases that eventually lead to SW-EIC Accept
Metric: The sum of the duration between activity 'SW-AE Assign Reviewers' and activity 'SW-EIC Accept'

Name: Time elapsed from SW-AE Assign Reviewers to SW-Reviewer Declined compared to time to SW-Reviewer Agreed
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'SW-AE Assign Reviewers' and activity 'SW-Reviewer Declined'

Name: Average time from SW-AE Assign Reviewers to SW-Reviewer No Response
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'SW-AE Assign Reviewers' and activity 'SW-Reviewer No Response'

Name: Minimum time between SW-AE Assign Reviewers and the subsequent Reviewer Invitation Reminder 1
Metric: The minimum of the duration between activity 'SW-AE Assign Reviewers' and activity 'Reviewer Invitation Reminder 1'

Name: Total time from SW-AE Assign Reviewers to SW-Awaiting EIC Decision in variants containing multiple reviewer assignment cycles
Metric: The sum of the duration between activity 'SW-AE Assign Reviewers' and activity 'SW-Awaiting EIC Decision'

Name: Average time it takes SW-AE Assign Reviewers to be followed by a successful SW-Reviewer Agreed after a prior SW-Reviewer Declined
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'SW-AE Assign Reviewers' and activity 'SW-Reviewer Agreed'

Name: Elapsed time from SW-AE Assign Reviewers to SW-Reviewer Unavailable versus SW-Reviewer Agreed
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'SW-AE Assign Reviewers' and activity 'SW-Reviewer Unavailable'

Name: Average waiting time to SW-Reviewer Agreed after the final occurrence of SW-AE Assign Reviewers in each case
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'SW-AE Assign Reviewers' and activity 'SW-Reviewer Agreed'

Name: Total time from the first SW-AE Assign Reviewers to the last SW-Reviewer Agreed in complex variants with repeated assignments
Metric: The sum of the duration between activity 'SW-AE Assign Reviewers' and activity 'SW-Reviewer Agreed'

Name: Minimum time from SW-AE Assign Reviewers to SW-Reviewer Agreed in variants that result in SW-EIC Major Revision
Metric: The minimum of the duration between activity 'SW-AE Assign Reviewers' and activity 'SW-Reviewer Agreed'

Name: Time of SW-AE Assign Reviewers activity measured as the span between its earliest and latest timestamp within a single case
Metric: The average of the duration between activity SW-AE Assign Reviewers and the end of the case

Name: Average time between consecutive SW-AE Assign Reviewers events before a SW-Reviewer Agreed is recorded
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'SW-AE Assign Reviewers' and activity 'SW-Reviewer Agreed'

Name: Total time from SW-AE Assign Reviewers to SW-Awaiting AE Recommendation in cases where no reviewer ever agreed
Metric: The sum of the duration between activity 'SW-AE Assign Reviewers' and activity 'SW-Awaiting AE Recommendation'

Name: Elapsed time from SW-AE Assign Reviewers to SW-Reviewer Agreed in comparison with time to RW-Reviewer Agreed in revised manuscript phases
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'SW-AE Assign Reviewers' and activity 'RW-Reviewer Agreed'

Name: Time it takes SW-AE Assign Reviewers to yield a SW-Reviewer Agreed after a Reviewer Invitation Reminder 2 has been issued
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'SW-AE Assign Reviewers' and activity 'SW-Reviewer Agreed'

Name: Time from SW-AE Assign Reviewers to SW-Reviewer Agreed grouped by case:concept:name to identify outlier cases
Metric: ERROR: computing metric {'begin': activity == 'SW-AE Assign Reviewers'", 'end': "activity == 'SW-Reviewer Agreed'", 'aggregation': 'average', 'group_by': 'concept:name'}"
